title: Invariant Testing, Fuzzing, and Reproducible Benchmarks · Structure Brief: Model Based Tests
summary: Audit custom structures whose happy paths pass but long random operation sequences corrupt state. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa model based tests increment in a model-based test and benchmark harness. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compare custom operations against a simpler trusted reference model.
Write executable representation invariants that fail near the corrupting operation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
